nasb.text: Then Queen Esther, daughter of Abihail, with Mordecai the Jew, wrote with full authority to confirm this second letter about Purim.

esv.text: Then Queen Esther, the daughter of Abihail, and Mordecai the Jew gave full written authority, confirming this second letter about Purim.

cnv.text: 亞比孩的女兒王后以斯帖和猶大人末底改以全權寫了這第二封信，囑咐猶大人守這普珥節。

ccb.text: 亚比孩的女儿以斯帖王后和犹太人末底改以全权写第二封信，嘱咐犹太人守这普珥节，
